title: Nami Is Taken Onto the Ark
description: Enel’s game keeps removing fighters from the board, leaving only a few survivors scattered across Upper Yard.
scene: Across pages 17, this scene centers on Usopp, Enel, Nami, Gan Fall, Wyper. Enel’s game keeps removing fighters from the board, leaving only a few survivors scattered across Upper Yard.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: UNIT 1, go!! USOPP's space gallery pirates!!

summary: Enel’s game keeps removing fighters from the board, leaving only a few survivors scattered across Upper Yard.
